name: Context Platform OpenClaw
description: Delegates OpenClaw context assembly to the Context Platform daemon.

daemonUrl.label: Daemon URL
daemonUrl.help: HTTP base URL for the Context Platform OpenClaw daemon.

engineId.label: Engine ID
engineId.help: Context engine id registered inside OpenClaw.

usePlatformCompaction.label: Platform Compaction
usePlatformCompaction.help: Enable only when the daemon implements compaction; otherwise OpenClaw runtime compaction is used.
